name: Bitly
description: URL shortener with link management, QR codes, click analytics by geography/device/referrer, campaigns, and branded short domains.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_shorten
capabilities.description: Convert a long URL to a Bitlink (shortened URL).

capabilities.name: bitlinks_create
capabilities.description: Create a Bitlink with full metadata including title, tags, and deeplinks.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific Bitlink.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_update
capabilities.description: Update a Bitlink's title, tags, long URL, or archive status.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an unedited default Bitlink.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_expand
capabilities.description: Expand a Bitlink to retrieve its original long URL.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_clicks
capabilities.description: Get click counts for a Bitlink over time.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_clicks_summary
capabilities.description: Get total click count summary for a Bitlink.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_countries
capabilities.description: Get country-level click metrics for a Bitlink.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_referrers
capabilities.description: Get referrer click metrics for a Bitlink.

capabilities.name: bitlinks_devices
capabilities.description: Get device type click metrics for a Bitlink.

capabilities.name: groups_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of groups in the organization.

capabilities.name: groups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific group.

capabilities.name: groups_bitlinks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Bitlinks for a group.

capabilities.name: groups_clicks
capabilities.description: Get click counts on all group Bitlinks.

capabilities.name: groups_countries
capabilities.description: Get country-level click metrics for all group Bitlinks.

capabilities.name: campaigns_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all campaigns for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: campaigns_create
capabilities.description: Create a new campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific campaign.

capabilities.name: qrcodes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new QR code with optional customization.

capabilities.name: qrcodes_get_image
capabilities.description: Retrieve a QR code image in SVG, PNG, or JSON format.

capabilities.name: organizations_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of organizations for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: organizations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific organization.

capabilities.name: bsds_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all Branded Short Domains.
